title: Xaero Map Chinese Resourcepack
description: Xaero Map Chinese Resourcepack For Yifei
body:
**Brief introduction**

---
**Personal Chinese material pack,Unofficial version，Feel free to mention any suggestions，I saw on a domestic Wikipedia website in China that this map mod did not come with its own sinicization, so I thought that I would make it into a resource pack and release it for Chinese players to benefit**
